title: Redact Phone Numbers Before Logging
description: Redact phone numbers from text before writing it to application logs.
problem: Write redact_phones(text) that replaces any sequence matching common phone formats (e.g. '555-123-4567', '(555) 123-4567', '5551234567') with '[PHONE]'.
starter_code:
import re

def redact_phones(text):
    # Replace phone-number-like patterns with [PHONE]
    return text
